name: De Rham Cohomology
description: Cohomology of smooth manifolds via differential forms. The de Rham complex (Ω*(M), d) yields cohomology groups HⁱdR(M) that are topological invariants. de Rham's theorem: HⁱdR(M) ≅ Hⁱ(M;ℝ) (singular cohomology). Foundation for Sullivan's rational homotopy theory, which uses differential forms as the primary algebraic model.
mermaid:
graph TD
    DefForms["Def: Differential forms\nΩ^k(M), wedge product"]
    DefExt["Def: Exterior derivative d\nΩ^k → Ω^{k+1}"]
    LemDSq["Lem: d² = 0"]
    DefDRComplex["Def: De Rham complex\n(Ω*(M), d)"]
    DefClosed["Def: Closed form\ndω = 0"]
    DefExact["Def: Exact form\nω = dη"]
    LemExactClosed["Lem: Exact ⇒ closed"]
    DefHdR["Def: HⁱdR(M) = Zⁱ/Bⁱ\nclosed mod exact"]
    ThmDR["Thm: de Rham\nHⁱdR(M) ≅ Hⁱ(M;ℝ)"]
    LemPoincare["Lem: Poincaré lemma\nContractible ⇒ HⁱdR = 0 for i>0"]
    DefForms --> DefExt
    DefExt --> LemDSq
    DefExt --> DefDRComplex
    LemDSq --> DefClosed
    LemDSq --> DefExact
    DefClosed --> DefHdR
    DefExact --> LemExactClosed
    LemExactClosed --> DefHdR
    DefHdR --> ThmDR
    LemPoincare --> ThmDR
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    classDef lemma fill:#74c0fc,color:#fff,stroke:#4dabf7
    class DefForms,DefExt,DefDRComplex,DefClosed,DefExact,DefHdR definition
    class ThmDR theorem
    class LemDSq,LemExactClosed,LemPoincare lemma
